description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>と<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>和<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

name.en: The Goal of All Life is Death

description.en: Attacks all enemies and reduces the target's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>. Additionally, has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Reduced Defense</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-30%</color> 감소시킵니다. 추가로 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-30%</color>DOWNさせる。また、<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 对全体敌人造成伤害,并使目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>立即降低<color=#28d9ed>-30%</color>。有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率额外使全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

name.jp: エレメンタルバースト

description.en: Attacks all enemies.\nDeals increased damage if the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n대상이 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color> 상태라면 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\n対象が<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>状態の場合、ダメージがUPする。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>状态,则伤害提升。

name.jp: エレメンタルバースト

description.en: Attacks all enemies.\nDeals increased damage if the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n대상이 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color> 상태라면 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\n対象が<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>状態の場合、ダメージがUPする。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>状态,则伤害提升。

description.en: (Passive Effect) Increases <color=#28d9ed>5</color> Weakness Gauge every turn and increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> upon taking <color=#28d9ed>Critical</color> damage.\n\nWhen an ally remains alive, reduces <color=#28d9ed>damage taken</color> by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>. When Dual Attack is activated, inflicts Burned on the target for 2 turns.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 매 턴 WG를 <color=#28d9ed>5</color> 회복하고, <color=#28d9ed>치명</color> 피해를 입을 시 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> 증가합니다.\n\n아군 생존 시 <color=#28d9ed>받는 피해</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 감소하며 협공 사용 시 대상에게 화상을 2턴 동안 부여합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)毎ターンWGを<color=#28d9ed>5</color>回復し、<color=#28d9ed>会心</color>ダメージを受けると、<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>UPする。\n\n戦場に味方がいる場合、<color=#28d9ed>受けるダメージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>DOWNし、連携使用時、対象に火傷を2ターンの間付与する。
description.zh: (被动效果)每回合使WG恢复<color=#28d9ed>5</color>,受到<color=#28d9ed>暴击</color>伤害时,使<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>。\n\n友军存活时,<color=#28d9ed>所受伤害</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>,且使用夹攻时,对目标造成烧伤效果,持续2回合。

description.en:
Becomes <color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color> when Health drops to <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> of Max Health or lower.

<color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color>: Grants an irremovable effect to the caster that increases Attack and reduces damage taken for 3 turns and recovers 30% Weakness Gauge. Summons Lisha and Iris. Enraged lasts for 3 turns.

<color=#28d9ed>Darkest Domination</color>: Used when Enraged ends.
Attacks all enemies and reduces their <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>. Has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
This attack ignores the target's <color=#28d9ed>Resilience</color>.
description.kr:
최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> 이하가 되면 <color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태로 전환합니다. 

<color=#28d9ed>광폭화 돌입</color> : 자신에게 해제되지 않는 공격력 증가/피해 감소 효과를 3턴 동안 부여하고 WG 30%를 회복합니다. 리샤와 아이리스를 소환하고 광폭화는 3턴 동안 유지됩니다.

<color=#28d9ed>진실 너머의 거짓</color> : 광폭화 종료 시 사용.
적 전체를 공격하고 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-30%</color> 감소시킵니다. 추가로 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
이 공격은 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 저항</color>을 무시합니다.
description.jp:
最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>以下になると<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態に切り替わる。

<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>:自分に解除不可能な攻撃力UP/ダメージDOWN効果を3ターンの間付与し、WG30%を回復する。リーシャとアイリスを召喚し、【狂暴化】は3ターンの間持続する。

<color=#28d9ed>【真実の向こうの偽り】</color>:【狂暴化】終了時に発動する。
敵全体にダメージを与え、対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-30%</color>DOWNさせる。また、<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
このスキルは対象の<color=#28d9ed>効果抵抗</color>を無視する。
description.zh:
若生命值降至上限的<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>以下,则转换为<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>状态。

<color=#28d9ed>进入狂暴化</color>:使自身获得无法解除的攻击力提升/伤害降低效果,持续3回合,并使WG恢复30%。召唤莉莎和艾尔丽斯,且狂暴化持续3回合。

<color=#28d9ed>真实彼岸的谎言</color>:狂暴化结束时发动。
攻击全体敌人,并使目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>-30%</color>。有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率额外使目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
该攻击无视目标的<color=#28d9ed>效果抵抗</color>。
